creator: afiskon@devzen.ru
text:
Oh, I figured it out. For some reason system didn't assign 127.0.0.1 alias to lo0. 

Command:

sudo ifconfig lo0 127.0.0.1

... fixed everything.

Anyway it has nothing to do with a kernel and I probably should re-check my /etc/rc.conf and also my brain, just to be sure :) Sorry for bothering.
